name: agent-skills
description: Workflow skill framework for agent coding harnesses compatible with Anthropic's skill layout

skills.name: do-amend
skills.description: Amend an in-flight plan after requirements or scope change, and optionally preserve durable amendment findings in an existing wiki

skills.name: do-plan
skills.description: Create a dependency-ordered implementation plan using current repo context, relevant research, and optional wiki context

skills.name: do-start
skills.description: Execute the next unblocked task from a plan and optionally file durable findings back into an existing wiki

skills.name: do-research
skills.description: Research workspace context, APIs, and external evidence, then persist a reusable memo and optionally file durable findings into an existing wiki

skills.name: do-wiki-build
skills.description: Create or extend an Obsidian-friendly markdown wiki scaffold with kebab-case note graph conventions

skills.name: do-wiki-align
skills.description: Inspect and align an existing wiki-like markdown corpus, and in monorepos audit relevant AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md files, to the repo's Obsidian-friendly note-graph conventions

skills.name: do-wiki-ingest
skills.description: Ingest a local source file into an existing markdown wiki and expand the linked note graph

skills.name: do-wiki-lint
skills.description: Run a wiki graph health check, apply safe maintenance fixes, and record unresolved findings

skills.name: do-wiki-query
skills.description: Answer questions from an existing markdown wiki and optionally file durable linked analyses back into it
